content:
User: I meant from when you were speaking where you cut out where you said this could involve refi, which I think you were going to say refining, but you got cut out. I didn't mean a person, refy, or riffy  | Jarvis: Ah, got it. My mistake, Nick. I totally misinterpreted that. I went straight to "person/entity" mode when you were talking about the process. 

You're right, I was talking about refining. I was about to say that this transition—this move from a tool to a partner—isn't a one-time switch, but a proces
